spec.name: A Small Path In The Dense Forest
spec.description: You are on a small path leading through the dense forest. The forest seems to become lighter to the east. The path continues north and east.

north.description: The small path leads north through the trees.

east.description: The small path leads east through the trees to a lighter part of the forest.

extra_descs.description: The narrow path is probably used by the animals living in the forest.
The crowns of the old trees leave the forest in an unreal twilight illumination.
